subcodes.first_line: O thou promoter of the Cause of God! Whatsoever thou beholdest existing in this world is but a mirage, not water; a vapor [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مبلّغ امر اللّه ، آنچه درعالم وجود موجود مشاهده نمائی سراب است نه آب ضباب است
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @power of prayer
